testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_creation_responds_under_3_seconds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:43: in test_enhanced_treat_creation_responds_under_3_seconds assert response.status_code in [200, 429], f"Expected 200 or 429, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 or 429, got 500: {"detail":"Error creating enhanced treat: E11000 duplicate key error collection: dogefood_lab_production.players index: address_1 dup key: { address: \"test_perf_agent_v2\" }, full error: {'index': 0, 'code': 11000, 'errmsg': 'E11000 duplicate key error collection: dogefood_lab_production.players index: address_1 dup key: { address: \"test_perf_agent_v2\" }', 'keyPattern': {'address': 1}, 'keyValue': {'address': 'test_perf_agent_v2'}}"} E assert 500 in [200, 429] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_streak
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:127: in test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_streak assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_message
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:148: in test_enhanced_treat_response_contains_message assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_rate_limiting_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Got unexpected status code: 500 assert 500 in [200, 429, 400]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_treat_creation_performance.py:309: in test_rate_limiting_works assert code in valid_codes, f"Got unexpected status code: {code}" E AssertionError: Got unexpected status code: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 429, 400]
